name: zimage-turbo-fun-union-2.0
description: Z-Image Turbo Fun ControlNet Union 2.0 — Union-style ControlNet patch supporting pose/depth/canny/hed/scribble preprocessors via a 4-dim type indicator. 15 control layers inject residuals into the main ZImage transformer at stride-2.
